programme.desc: Tugann Olivia faoi deara go bhfuil rud éigin aisteach ag dul ar aghaidh idir Sonny agus Berni. (Olivia notices that something is off between Sonny and Berni.)

programme.title: Call My Agent!
programme.desc: Tá Mathias ag tarraingt cainte, an ngabhfaidh sé ag obair d'iomaitheoirí ASK? (Tongues are wagging over Mathias' next step, is he going to work for ASK's rivals?)

programme.title: Taobh Thiar den Roth

programme.title: Brú

programme.title: Cneasaithe

programme.title: France 24
programme.desc: Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)

programme.title: Cúla4
programme.desc: Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)

programme.title: Bréidín & Clúmh
programme.desc: Tá Bréidín ag iarraidh droichead corrach a thrasnú ach cé a chastar air ach Clúmh ag dul an treo eile! (Tweedy attempts to cross a wobbly bridge.)

programme.title: CoComelon It's Cody Time
programme.desc: Tagann deirfiúirín óg Cody abhaile! (Cody's new baby sister is home!)

programme.title: CoComelon JJ's Animal
programme.desc: Tá sé in am torthaí a chur! (It's time to grow grow grow your fruit!)

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Sciobann Sciobaí fáinne pósta agus caithfidh Dora é a fháil ar ais. (Swiper swipes a pearl wedding ring, and Dora treks to the ocean to find it.)

programme.title: Elmo Anseo
programme.desc: Ag déanamh ióga a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning about yoga today.)

programme.title: Pip & Posy
programme.desc: Tá Jamila agus Posy sa tóir ar thaisce i gcluiche nua atá acu. (Posy and Jamila's imaginations take a rainbow treasure hunt game in a direction that Pip doesn't expect.)

programme.title: Olobob Top
programme.desc: Is breá leis na hOlobobanna a bheith ag ligean orthu féin gur foghlaithe mara iad. (Playing pirates is fun, especially with the help of Ladybaard and some Goldy Glitter Fruit!)

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Tá rún ag Romeo na PJ Mascanna a sháinniú. (Romeo wants to create the ultimate trap for the PJ Masks.)

programme.title: Wussywat
programme.desc: Cruthaíonn Wussywat agus a cairde píosa ealaíne le péint. (Wussywat and her friends experiment with paint.)

programme.title: Clifford
programme.desc: Socraíonn Caitlín scannán a stiúradh le cúnamh óna cuid cairde. (Samantha decides to direct a film with the help of her friends.)

programme.title: Woozle & Pip
programme.desc: Tarraingíonn cluiche foghlaithe mara achrann idir Woozle agus Pip. (Woozle and Pip have an argument while playing pirates.)

programme.title: Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Tosaíonn Ginger agus na Piseanna-Rex óga ag búireach agus ní fada go mbíonn gach neach beo ag búireach freisin. (Ginger and the baby Pea-Rexes start a massive roar off.)

programme.title: Dialann Alice
programme.desc: Céard atá i bhfolach ag Alice faoina hata? (What is Alice hiding under her hat?)

programme.title: Dialann Alice
programme.desc: Tá seomra Alice chomh mínéata is go dtéann Gertrude amú ann. (Gertrude goes missing in Alice's untidy room.)

programme.title: Dialann Alice
programme.desc: Tá sé ag cinneadh ar Alice bronntanas a fháil do Emile dá bhreithlá. (It's hard for Alice to think of what to get Emile for his birthday.)

programme.title: Scoil na Sceire
programme.desc: Is é inniu an lá deiridh ar scoil do na Neacha Beaga agus is fada leo go mbeidh saoire acu. (It's the last day of school before the Reefies head off on their holiday adventures.)

programme.title: Cúla4
programme.desc: Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)

programme.title: Charlie agus Lola
programme.desc: Faigheann Lola agus a cara Lotta amach faoi iontaisí. (Lola and her best friend Lotta find out about fossils.)

programme.title: Petronix Defenders
programme.desc: Caithfidh na Petronix an t-éan suirí atá fuadaithe ag an gCró-Mháistreás a aimsiú. (The Ringmaster kidnaps a Lovebird, leaving their life partner sad and alone.)

programme.title: Pat an Madra
programme.desc: Tá Lola maraithe go bhfeicfidh sí réalta reatha le go mbeidh sí in ann mian a croí a iarraidh. (Lola is determined to spy a shooting star so that she can make a wish.)

programme.title: Angelo Rules
programme.desc: Cuireann Tracy an milleán ar Angelo nuair a bhriseann sí a lámh. (Tracy blames Angelo for breaking her arm.)

programme.title: Dónall Dána
programme.desc: Beidh ar Dhónall fanacht sa Scoil Náisiúnta go brách mura mbeidh sé cúramach! (Dónall realises that he could be stuck in school for the rest of his life!)

programme.title: Cúla4
programme.desc: Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)

programme.title: Super Simple Amhráin
programme.desc: Amhrán spraíúil faoi uachtar reoite brocailí a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about broccoli ice cream.)

programme.title: Blocuimhreacha
programme.desc: Lá breá atá ann do phicnic ach tá ceann de na flapóga ar iarraidh! An bhfuil duine éigin ag sciobadh na bhflapóg? (Is there a Flapjack-snaffler on the loose?)

programme.title: Blocdhathanna
programme.desc: Tá Donn an taiscéalaí le muid a thabhairt ar aistear sa bhforaois inniu. (Today, Brown the Explorer brings us on a journey through the forest.)

programme.title: Na Blociontais
programme.desc: Tá Gabh agus Stop ag fáil faoi réir do phicnic. (Sing along with Go and Stop as they get ready for a picnic.)

programme.title: Am Foghlama le Timmy
programme.desc: Ag comhaireamh bratach agus ag foghlaim faoi dhathanna a bheifear ar chlár an lae inniu le Timmy. (Today we are counting and learning about colours with Timmy.)

programme.title: Lá Le Mamó nó Daideo
programme.desc: Tá Sadhbh leis an lá a chaitheamh in éineacht lena Daideo, Micheál Ó Muircheartaigh. (Sadhbh is going to visit her Daideo Micheál Ó Muircheartaigh today.)

programme.title: Pip & Posy
programme.desc: Itheann Pip agus Posy cácaí Frankie i ngan fhios di. (Pip and Posy give in to temptation and eat Frankie's cakes without her knowing.)

programme.title: Béiríní is a Leabhair
programme.desc: Cailleann Lasairín foighne nuair a sháinnítear na Béiríní sna creaga lá báistí. (Lasairín is frustrated when the Bears are trapped under a rocky outcrop in a rainstorm.)

programme.title: Béiríní is a Leabhair
programme.desc: Smaoiníonn Gobnait ar bhealaí iontacha le spraoi a bhaint as maide. (The Bears explore some imaginative ways to play with a stick.)

programme.title: Pikwik Pack
programme.desc: Tá Tila ag súil le pacáiste ach nuair a chastar iora glic ar Tibor, éiríonn an scéal an-chasta! (A delivery for Tila is complicated when Tibor falls for a sneaky squirrel.)

programme.title: Nuair a Bheidh Mé Mór

programme.title: Zou

programme.title: Dee Dee
programme.desc: An bhfuil ortha ag Deedee chun an fhail atá ar Mewmew a leigheas? (Does Deedee have some sort of spell to rid Mewmew of his hiccups?)

programme.title: Is Mise

programme.title: Ainmhithe Craiceáilte

programme.title: The Golden Girls
